calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2017 Continued To Jul-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Senick for petitioner Craig Roberts.

The Court stated that the only issue related to the reduction of shares for units N,O, P & Q. Mr. Senick replied that IRA accounts distributions are generally paid directly into the estate, but two IRA institutions had made distributions directly to the beneficiaries, and those distributions corresponded to the questioned reductions. The Court inquired if there was any documentation to support that assertion. Mr. Senick stated that he could provide it to the Court within two weeks. The matter was continued to July 24, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)
